pkgmetadata.longdescription:
This is a library for ad hoc P2p networking, developed for the Barracuda chat client (by Stephan Friedrichs, Henning G³nther, Oliver Mielentz and Martin Wegner).
This library implements the RFCs (see for example <http://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-strauss-p2p-chat>).
The Darcs repository can be found at <http://repos.mroot.net/sep07-adhoc>
